Citrate cycle (TCA cycle).label: Cellular Energy Production
Citrate cycle (TCA cycle).impact: Core ATP generation cycle is under-active, reducing stamina and post-exertion recovery.

Oxidative phosphorylation.label: Mitochondrial ATP Output
Oxidative phosphorylation.impact: Mitochondrial electron transport efficiency is reduced, limiting sustainable energy production.

Glycolysis / Gluconeogenesis.label: Glucose Utilization
Glycolysis / Gluconeogenesis.impact: Glucose-to-energy conversion is impaired, causing unstable energy levels and brain fog.
actions: Consider chromium or berberine under supervision

Fatty acid degradation.label: Fat Burning Capacity
Fatty acid degradation.impact: Capacity to derive energy from fats is reduced, increasing metabolic inflexibility.
actions: Extend overnight fast to 12h if tolerated

Fatty acid metabolism.label: Lipid Energy Metabolism
Fatty acid metabolism.impact: Fat-derived energy efficiency is below threshold, reducing metabolic adaptability.
actions: Increase dietary healthy fats (olive oil, avocado)

Starch and sucrose metabolism.label: Carbohydrate Processing
Starch and sucrose metabolism.impact: Complex carbohydrate digestion and processing pathways show reduced activity.

D-Amino acid metabolism.label: Neurotransmitter Balance
D-Amino acid metabolism.impact: Neurochemical precursor availability is reduced, affecting mood stability and cognitive sharpness.

GABAergic synapse.label: Inhibitory Neurotransmission
GABAergic synapse.impact: GABA-mediated calming signalling is impaired, increasing anxiety and sleep fragmentation.

Serotonergic synapse.label: Mood Regulation Circuitry
Serotonergic synapse.impact: Serotonin pathway signalling is suboptimal, increasing vulnerability to low mood and appetite dysregulation.

Dopaminergic synapse.label: Reward and Drive Circuits
Dopaminergic synapse.impact: Dopaminergic reward signalling is reduced, affecting focus, drive, and motivation.

Neurotrophin signaling pathway.label: Neuroplasticity and BDNF
Neurotrophin signaling pathway.impact: Neuroplasticity and brain-derived neurotrophic factor pathways are under-supported.

Glutamatergic synapse.label: Excitatory Neurotransmission
Glutamatergic synapse.impact: Glutamate signalling balance is disrupted, affecting cognitive sharpness and stress response.

Dopamine metabolism.label: Dopamine Synthesis & Clearance
Dopamine metabolism.impact: Dopamine synthesis or clearance is inefficient, affecting drive and executive function.

Sulfur metabolism.label: Sulfur Detoxification Pathway
Sulfur metabolism.impact: Sulfur-based detox pathways are under-performing, reducing ability to clear toxins and reactive compounds.
actions: Sulfur-rich foods daily (eggs, garlic, onion, cruciferous)

Glutathione metabolism.label: Antioxidant Defence
Glutathione metabolism.impact: Glutathione-based antioxidant defence is reduced, increasing oxidative stress burden.

Drug metabolism - cytochrome P450.label: Phase I Detoxification
Drug metabolism - cytochrome P450.impact: Phase I liver detoxification capacity is compromised, slowing metabolic clearance of toxins and medications.
actions: Adequate protein intake for enzyme synthesis

Xenobiotics biodegradation and metabolis.label: Environmental Toxin Clearance
Xenobiotics biodegradation and metabolis.impact: Capacity to neutralise environmental chemicals and pollutants is below functional threshold.
actions: Reduce environmental toxin exposure (organic food, filtered water)
Increase fibre to support gut transit

Cyanoamino acid metabolism.label: Nitrogen Detoxification
Cyanoamino acid metabolism.impact: Nitrogen waste handling pathways are suboptimal, increasing metabolic burden.
actions: Reduce high-purine food load if elevated uric acid

TNF signaling pathway.label: Inflammatory Signalling Control
TNF signaling pathway.impact: TNF-driven inflammatory signalling is elevated, increasing systemic inflammatory burden and recovery time.

IL-17 signaling pathway.label: Mucosal Inflammation
IL-17 signaling pathway.impact: IL-17 pathway activation suggests elevated mucosal or autoimmune inflammatory activity.
actions: Elimination of common inflammatory foods (gluten trial, dairy trial)

NF-kappa B signaling pathway.label: Core Inflammatory Switch
NF-kappa B signaling pathway.impact: Master inflammatory regulator NF-κB shows elevated activity, amplifying chronic inflammation risk.

Asthma.label: Airway Inflammation
Asthma.impact: Respiratory inflammatory pathways are elevated, indicating heightened airway sensitivity.

Arachidonic acid metabolism.label: Prostaglandin & Inflammation Cascade
Arachidonic acid metabolism.impact: Arachidonic acid-driven inflammatory cascade is active, increasing pain sensitivity and tissue inflammation.

PPAR signaling pathway.label: Anti-Inflammatory Receptor Activity
PPAR signaling pathway.impact: PPAR anti-inflammatory receptor signalling is reduced, impairing the body's ability to dampen inflammation.

p53 signaling pathway.label: Cellular Repair Signalling
p53 signaling pathway.impact: Cellular DNA-damage response and repair signalling is suboptimal, reducing tissue maintenance capacity.

mTOR signaling pathway.label: Growth and Repair Signalling
mTOR signaling pathway.impact: mTOR-mediated protein synthesis and repair signalling is below threshold, limiting muscle and tissue recovery.

AMPK signaling pathway.label: Cellular Energy Sensing
AMPK signaling pathway.impact: AMPK energy-sensing and cellular housekeeping is compromised, reducing metabolic flexibility and cell repair.

Autophagy.label: Cellular Recycling & Longevity
Autophagy.impact: Cellular autophagy (clean-up) pathways are under-active, allowing accumulation of damaged proteins and organelles.

Longevity regulating pathway.label: Longevity & Resilience Pathways
Longevity regulating pathway.impact: Key longevity-regulating pathways (sirtuins, FOXO) are under-active, accelerating cellular ageing signals.
actions: Caloric balance (avoid chronic restriction or excess)

Insulin signaling pathway.label: Insulin Sensitivity
Insulin signaling pathway.impact: Insulin signalling efficiency is reduced, increasing risk of blood sugar instability and metabolic syndrome.

AGE-RAGE signaling pathway in diabetic c.label: Glycation & Inflammatory Stress
AGE-RAGE signaling pathway in diabetic c.impact: Advanced glycation end-products are driving elevated inflammatory burden, increasing vascular and tissue stress.

Prostate cancer.label: Androgen-Driven Proliferative Signalling
Prostate cancer.impact: Androgen receptor and proliferative signalling pathways show elevated activity.

Aquaporin-mediated transport.label: Cellular Hydration & Transport
Aquaporin-mediated transport.impact: Water and mineral transport efficiency across cell membranes is compromised.
